scripts.pack:packages: npm pack --workspace @desin-ai/inspector --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @desin-ai/inspector-react --dry-run && npm pack --workspace @desin-ai/inspector-vite --dry-run
scripts.release:dry-run: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check && npm run pack:packages
scripts.release:publish: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check && npm publish --workspace @desin-ai/inspector && npm publish --workspace @desin-ai/inspector-react && npm publish --workspace @desin-ai/inspector-vite
